links.label: Grand Canyon National Park - North Rim Status

data.evacuation_notes: Southbound State Route 67 is closed south of Jacob Lake. The following trails are closed until further notice at the Grand Canyon National Park: North Kaibab Trail South Kaibab Trail Phantom Ranch and Bright Angel Campground area. Boat Beach is open for river runners to stop and refill water, However, they must continue to Pipe Creek beach for exchanges. Bright Angel Trail below Havasupai Gardens. River exchanges are allowed to pass through this area at their discretion. River Trail between Pipe Creek and the South Kaibab Tonto East between Havasupai Garden and Tip Off All backcountry routes and canyoneering routes stemming from the North or South Kaibab, or the Bright Angel Trail. Coconino County Evacuation Map Coconino County Emergency Alerts Signup
